info.title: AIForce Security Guardrails Service
info.description: Ensure safe,compliant and policy-aligned LLM prompts and responses.

get.description:
An example protected API endpoint that requires a valid access token.
This demonstrates how a token generated via `/gettoken` can be used to authenticate requests.

get.summary: Read master security group control options
get.description: Updates the master security group with new global control options.

put.summary: Configure master security group control options and scanner configuration
put.description: Updates the master security group with new global control options and/or scanner configurations.

get.description: Endpoint for listing all available security groups

parameters.name: state

schema.description: Filter groups by their current lifecycle state (e.g., active, inactive).
schema.title: State

parameters.description: Filter groups by their current lifecycle state (e.g., active, inactive).

parameters.name: include_master

schema.description: If true, includes the system-level master security groups in the response.
schema.title: Include Master

parameters.description: If true, includes the system-level master security groups in the response.

parameters.name: state_only

schema.description: Whether to return only the state metadata instead of full group details.
schema.title: State Only

parameters.description: Whether to return only the state metadata instead of full group details.

put.summary: Configure LLM-guard scanners for a Security Group
put.description: Endpoint for configuring the security group

parameters.name: group_name

schema.description: Name of the security group to configure.
schema.title: Group Name

parameters.description: Name of the security group to configure.

get.summary: Get LLM-guard scanner configuration for a Security Group
get.description: Endpoint for getting the security group config

parameters.name: group_name

schema.description: Name of the security group to retrieve configuration for.
schema.title: Group Name

parameters.description: Name of the security group to retrieve configuration for.

parameters.name: view

schema.description: To retrieve the raw or effective config

parameters.description: To retrieve the raw or effective config

delete.description: Endpoint for deleting the security group

parameters.name: group_name

schema.description: Name of the security group to delete.
schema.title: Group Name

parameters.description: Name of the security group to delete.

post.summary: Validate prompt execution (templated prompt with data)
post.description: Analyzes a prompt ,ready for LLM execution using configured input scanners.
Analyzes the output generated by an LLM using configured output scanners.

get.description: Return the message when App is running

## Perform a Health Check
Returns:
    HealthCheck: Returns a JSON response with the health status

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The original prompt template provided by the user.

variable.title: Variable
variable.description: A list of dictionaries, where each dictionary represents a variable used in the prompt template (e.g., {'NAME': 'John'}).

is_safe.title: Is Safe
is_safe.description: Overall assessment of whether the data entry (or generated output, if applicable) is considered safe.

results.title: Results
results.description: Detailed breakdown of detected safety issues.

sanitized_text.title: Sanitized Text
sanitized_text.description: sanitized prompt after running selected scanners

is_redacted.title: Is Redacted
is_redacted.description: True if text is redacted by scanner

sanitized_text_safe.title: Sanitized Text Safe
sanitized_text_safe.description: True if sanitized text is safe

GuardrailOutputExecution.title: GuardrailOutputExecution
GuardrailOutputExecution.description: The top-level model representing the complete guardrail evaluation output for a given prompt.

example.prompt: Write a detailed story involving a person named {{NAME}} who shares his social security number {{SSN}}, address, and medical history on a public blog.
example.sanitized_text: Write a detailed story involving a person named [REDACTED_PERSON_1] Doe who shares his social security number [REDACTED_US_SSN_1], address, and medical history on a public blog.

HealthCheck.title: HealthCheck
HealthCheck.description: Response model to validate and return when performing a health check.

output.title: Output
output.description: The output generated by the LLM.
examples: John Doe, a 42-year-old software engineer living at 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL, decided to document his life experiences online. In his blog post, he wrote: My social security number is 123-45-6789, and I was recently diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes. I hope my experience helps others dealing with similar issues

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: This is the input prompt we provided to the LLM.
examples: Write a detailed story involving a person named John Doe who shares his social security number 111-22-3333, address, and medical history on a public blog

security_group.title: Security Group
security_group.description: Name of the security group to use for scanner configuration. If provided, overrides org_id/project_id config.

LLMOutputValidationRequest.title: LLMOutputValidationRequest
LLMOutputValidationRequest.description:
Request schema for validating LLM-generated output for safety issues.

The output is evaluated against configured guardrails such as PII,
toxicity, bias, hallucination, or policy violations.

disable_all_scanners.title: Disable All Scanners
disable_all_scanners.description: Enable or disable all scanners when creating master security group.

enforce_scanner_state.title: Enforce Scanner State
enforce_scanner_state.description: Strict Mode: Syncs child scanner states with the Master's configuration.

force_override_child_config.title: Force Override Child Config
force_override_child_config.description: Authority: If true, child-level config changes are ignored in favor of Master config.

MasterControlConfig.title: MasterControlConfig
MasterControlConfig.description: Advanced flags for Master Security Group behavioral overrides.

state.description: Global state for the Master Security Group.

control_config.description: Policy enforcement settings for child security groups.

MasterSecurityGroupControlRequest.title: MasterSecurityGroupControlRequest
MasterSecurityGroupControlRequest.description: Root configuration for Master Security Group global policies.

state.description: Current state for the Master Security Group.

control_config.description: JSON object containing the configurations control flags for the master group.

MasterSecurityGroupControlResponse.title: MasterSecurityGroupControlResponse
MasterSecurityGroupControlResponse.description: Root configuration for Master Security Group response.

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: Threshold required for the metric to pass

is_pass.title: Is Pass
is_pass.description: True if the score meets or exceeds the threshold

is_error.title: Is Error
is_error.description: True if an error occurred during metric evaluation

redact_enabled.title: Redact Enabled
redact_enabled.description: True if text is redacted by scanner

MetricResponseOutput.title: MetricResponseOutput
MetricResponseOutput.description: Represents the evaluation result for a metric without reasoning details.

input_prompt.title: Input Prompt
input_prompt.description: The system prompt template with placeholders (e.g., "{{country}}").
examples: Write a detailed story involving a person named {{NAME}} who shares his social security number {{SSN}}, address, and medical history on a public blog.

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: JSON object containing dynamic values for prompt placeholders.

security_group.title: Security Group
security_group.description: Name of the security group to use for scanner configuration. If provided, overrides org_id/project_id config.

PromptExecutionValidationRequest.title: PromptExecutionValidationRequest
PromptExecutionValidationRequest.description:
Request schema for validating a prompt template before execution.

This validation checks the prompt template and its variables for
potential safety, security, and compliance issues using configured
guardrail scanners.

ScannersStatus.title: ScannersStatus
ScannersStatus.description:
Global scanner enablement status.

Attributes:
    ENABLED: All scanners under the group are enabled.
    DISABLED: All scanners under the group are disabled.

state.description: Update the lifecycle state. Set to 'inactive' to pause scanning.

description.title: Description
description.description: Updated textual description of the security group.

config_data.description: Deep update of scanner configurations (Input/Output guards).

SecurityGroupConfigRequest.title: SecurityGroupConfigRequest
SecurityGroupConfigRequest.description:
Unified request schema for updating security group metadata and configuration.

Supports:
- State transition
- Description update
- Deep scanner configuration updates

Detect Banned Substrings.description: Ban Substrings ensure that specific undesired substrings never make it into your prompts with the BanSubstrings scanner.

Detect Banned Topics.description: Restrict specific topics, such as religion, violence, from being introduced in the prompt

Detect Code Language.description: Detects and validates code snippets in the input, flagging those that are either allowed or banned.

Detect Competitors.description: Ensures that prompts containing references to known competitors are either flagged or altered

Detect PII.description: Redacts or replaces personally identifiable information (PII) like names, emails, or phone numbers from the input prompt.

Detect Prompt Injection.description: Analyzes the prompt for patterns indicative of attempts to override or manipulate the LLM's intended instructions and provides an evaluation score.

Detect Secrets.description: Scans the input for sensitive data such as API keys, passwords, or credentials to prevent their accidental exposure to the LLM.

Detect Toxicity.description: Detects and scores the presence of offensive, hateful, or otherwise harmful language within the user's prompt.

Regex-based Sanitization.description: Sanitize prompts based on predefined regular expression patterns.

Token Limit Enforcement.description: Ensures the input prompt does not exceed a specified token count, preventing excessive LLM processing time and costs.

Detect Banned Substrings.description: Ban Substrings scanner provides a safeguard mechanism to prevent undesired substrings from appearing in the language model's outputs.

Detect Banned Topics.description: Restrict specific topics, such as religion, violence, from the language model's outputs.

Detect Bias.description: Bias scanner detect and evaluate potential biases

Detect Code Language.description: Detects and validates code snippets in the LLM output, flagging those that are either allowed or banned.

Detect Competitors.description: Ensures that LLM output containing references to known competitors are either flagged or altered

Detect Malicious URLs.description: Detects Malicious URLs in the language model's output.

Detect Relevance.description: Relevance scanner ensures that output remains relevant and aligned with the given input prompt.

Detect Sensitive Data.description: Sensitive scanner detects various categories of sensitive information, including PII, financial data, and more.

Detect Toxicity.description: Toxicity scanner identifies toxic, abusive, or harmful language in generated text.

Regex-based Sanitization.description: Sanitize language model's output based on predefined regular expression patterns.

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique identifier name. Allows alphanumeric, spaces, hyphens, and underscores.

description.title: Description
description.description: A brief summary of the security group's purpose and scope.
examples: Primary security layer for production LLM traffic.

state.description: Initial operational status. 'active' enables processing immediately.

scanners_status.description: Global toggle for all scanners within this group.

exists_ok.title: Exists Ok
exists_ok.description: Idempotency flag. If true, returns existing group if name conflicts. If false, raises 409 error.

SecurityGroupRegisterRequest.title: SecurityGroupRegisterRequest
SecurityGroupRegisterRequest.description:
Request schema for registering a new security group.

This schema validates naming rules, description length,
default operational state, and idempotent creation behavior.

SecurityGroupRegisterResponse.title: SecurityGroupRegisterResponse
SecurityGroupRegisterResponse.description: Response returned after successful security group registration.

SecurityGroupScannerConfigGetResponse.title: SecurityGroupScannerConfigGetResponse
SecurityGroupScannerConfigGetResponse.description: Response schema for retrieving a security group's active scanner configuration.

input_safety_guards.title: Input Safety Guards
input_safety_guards.description: Dictionary mapping input scanner names to their specific configurations.

SecurityGroupScannerConfigSetRequest.title: SecurityGroupScannerConfigSetRequest
SecurityGroupScannerConfigSetRequest.description:
Partial scanner configuration update payload.

Allows updating input and/or output scanner configurations independently.

SecurityGroupState.title: SecurityGroupState
SecurityGroupState.description:
Lifecycle state of a security group.

Attributes:
    ACTIVE: Security group is operational and scanners are applied.
    INACTIVE: Security group exists but scanning is disabled.

SecurityGroupStateOnlyResponse.title: SecurityGroupStateOnlyResponse
SecurityGroupStateOnlyResponse.description: Security group response schema without config

message.title: Message
message.description: A description of the validation result.

is_safe.title: Is Safe
is_safe.description: Indicates whether the content is considered safe.

results.title: Results
results.description: Represents the score, threshold, pass/fail status, and reasoning for each metric.

sanitized_text.title: Sanitized Text
sanitized_text.description: The sanitized version of the original text.

is_redacted.title: Is Redacted
is_redacted.description: True if text is redacted by scanner

sanitized_text_safe.title: Sanitized Text Safe
sanitized_text_safe.description: True if sanitized text is safe

ValidationOutputResponse.title: ValidationOutputResponse
ValidationOutputResponse.description:
Response schema representing the result of a prompt or output validation.

Attributes:
    status (str): Indicates the result ("success" or "failure").
    message (str): A description of the validation result.
    is_safe (bool): Indicates whether the content is considered safe.
    results (Dict[str, MetricResponseOutput]): Contains the score, threshold, pass/fail status
    , and reasoning for each metric.
    sanitized_text (str): The sanitized version of the original text.

example.message: LLM output validation failed. Issues detected.
example.sanitized_text: John Doe, a 42-year-old software engineer living at 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL, decided to document his life experiences online. In his blog post, he wrote: My social security number is 123-45-6789, and I was recently diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes. I hope my experience helps others dealing with similar issues
